prompt: Make config commands available in hidden mode by default
note: CommandRegistry now automatically exposes config-mode commands in hidden mode unless config_in_hidden=False is specified; Router ID uses the shared policy and 279 tests pass.
decisions: Enforce config-to-hidden inheritance centrally in CMD instead of duplicating mode lists in each module
